THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAUNCH PAD, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUR LOGO HERE, LLC YLH HOLDINGS, INC. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,063.00, AMENDED JUDGMENT: PER ORDER OF EXAMINATION, JUDGMENT IS AMENDED TO ADD DEFENDANT AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR, YLH HOLDINGS, INC. DEFENDANT AGREES TO TENDER THE BALANCE IN ITS BUSINESS ACCOUNTS, AND NOT LESS THAN $137.00 IN PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. (ON JUN-11-09: DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT FOR PROGRESS REPORT. PLAINTIFF REPORTS DEFENDANTS FAILURE TO PAY THE JUNE 2009 INSTALLMENT PAYMENT. THEREFORE REMAINING AMOUNT IS DUE IMMEDIATELY.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
